bead.title: refactor(agent): surface kind:routing bead evidence to a consumer (cost-tier epic prereq)
bead.description:
Opus epic review (2026-04-15): kind:routing evidence written by V8 is write-only — no consumer reads events[].Kind == 'routing' except its own test file. The cost-tier epic (ddx-4b59b816) is the intended consumer, but the read path does not exist yet.

Scope: add a query helper in internal/bead that filters events by kind, and a CLI/GraphQL surface that rolls up routing decisions by bead (last N, per-harness success rate, escalation paths). This is a measurement primitive the cost-tier epic depends on.
bead.acceptance: (1) bead.Store.EventsByKind(beadID, kind) helper exists. (2) A new CLI (ddx bead routing <id> or similar) or GraphQL query returns routing events. (3) The cost-tier epic has a concrete consumer to plug into.
